allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); paths=d['compilerOptions']['paths']; print\({k: v for k, v in paths.items\(\) if k in ['@', '@/*', '~', '~/*', '#imports']}\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); opts=d.get\('compilerOptions',{}\); print\('strict:', opts.get\('strict'\)\); print\('noUncheckedIndexedAccess:', opts.get\('noUncheckedIndexedAccess'\)\); print\('strictNullChecks:', opts.get\('strictNullChecks'\)\)")
